text: UI error bars should have a z-index on top of all other elements, including sidebars and agents running

proposedTasks.title: Ensure error/notification bars render above all UI layers
proposedTasks.description:
Set a sufficiently high z-index on error notification bars (e.g. the 'Issue not found' toast) so they stack above sidebars, agent-status panels, and any other overlays.

Acceptance criteria:
- Error bars use a z-index higher than all sidebars, modals, and the running-agents panel.
- Error bars are fully visible and not clipped or obscured by any UI element.
- Existing layering of modals, dropdowns, and tooltips is preserved (establish a documented z-index scale if one does not exist).

taskTitles: Ensure error/notification bars render above all UI layers
